input.initialPrompt: I want to run these tests with dotnet test and collect a crash dump if any test crashes the host.

toolRequests.name: bash

arguments.description: Run tests with blame-crash to collect crash dumps

toolRequests.intentionSummary: Run tests with blame-crash to collect crash dumps

data.reasoningText:
The user wants to run the tests in this project with `dotnet test` and collect a crash dump if any test crashes the host. This involves using the `--blame-crash` option with `dotnet test`.

Let me first look at the project files to understand the setup.

arguments.description: Run tests with blame-crash to collect crash dumps

toolCalls.name: bash

data.content:
Tests ran successfully with `--blame-crash` enabled. Here's the command used:

```
dotnet test --blame-crash
```

All tests passed. If the test host process had crashed, a crash dump (`.dmp` file) would be collected automatically in the `TestResults` folder for post-mortem analysis.
